Technology-enhanced Assessment & Learning Environments

TALE is an international, peer-reviewed journal dedicated to advancing scholarship on how digital technologies transform assessment and learning environments.

Mission

TALE publishes rigorous, innovative, and critically reflective research at the intersection of pedagogy, assessment, learning sciences, and technology-enhanced environments.

Current Issue

Volume 1, Issue 1 (2026)

Theme: Reframing assessment and learning in digitally mediated ecosystems.

Issue metadata and featured papers can be updated in one place as publication progresses.

Browse papers
